titles.ar: باب الْمَرْأَةِ تُزَوَّجُ عَلَى عَمَّتِهَا أَوْ خَالَتِهَا
titles.en: Chapter 79 – The woman marries (as an additional wife) upon her paternal aunt or her maternal aunt

titles.ar: باب الْمَرْأَةِ تُزَوَّجُ عَلَى عَمَّتِهَا أَوْ خَالَتِهَا
titles.en: Chapter 79 – The woman marries (as an additional wife) upon her paternal aunt or her maternal aunt

segments: لَا تُزَوَّجُ ابْنَةُ الْأَخِ وَ لَا ابْنَةُ الْأُخْتِ عَلَى الْعَمَّةِ وَ لَا عَلَى الْخَالَةِ إِلَّا بِإِذْنِهِمَا وَ تُزَوَّجُ الْعَمَّةُ وَ الْخَالَةُ عَلَى ابْنَةِ الْأَخِ وَ ابْنَةِ الْأُخْتِ بِغَيْرِ إِذْنِهِمَا .
arabic.text: لَا تُزَوَّجُ ابْنَةُ الْأَخِ وَ لَا ابْنَةُ الْأُخْتِ عَلَى الْعَمَّةِ وَ لَا عَلَى الْخَالَةِ إِلَّا بِإِذْنِهِمَا وَ تُزَوَّجُ الْعَمَّةُ وَ الْخَالَةُ عَلَى ابْنَةِ الْأَخِ وَ ابْنَةِ الْأُخْتِ بِغَيْرِ إِذْنِهِمَا .

segments: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad Bin Isa, from Al Hassan Bin Ali Bin Fazzal, from Ibn Bukeyr, from Muhammad Bin Muslim,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Ja’far<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘You should neither marry a daughter of the brother, nor a daughter of the sister (as an additional wife) upon the paternal aunt, nor upon the maternal aunt, except with her permission; and the marriage of the paternal aunt and the maternal aunt (as an additional wife) upon a daughter of the brother and a daughter of the sister without her permission’.
en.hubeali.text:
Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad Bin Isa, from Al Hassan Bin Ali Bin Fazzal, from Ibn Bukeyr, from Muhammad Bin Muslim,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Ja’far<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘You should neither marry a daughter of the brother, nor a daughter of the sister (as an additional wife) upon the paternal aunt, nor upon the maternal aunt, except with her permission; and the marriage of the paternal aunt and the maternal aunt (as an additional wife) upon a daughter of the brother and a daughter of the sister without her permission’.

segments: 1. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn ‘Isa from al-Hassan ibn Ali ibn Faddal from ibn Bukayr from Muhammad ibn Muslim who has said the following: “Abu Ja‘far, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘You must not marry a daughter of a brother or daughter of a sister as a second wife, the first being her paternal or maternal aunt without their permission and you must not marry a paternal or maternal aunt as a second wife, the first being a daughter of her brother or a daughter of her sister, without their permission.’”
en.sarwar.text: 1. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn ‘Isa from al-Hassan ibn Ali ibn Faddal from ibn Bukayr from Muhammad ibn Muslim who has said the following: “Abu Ja‘far, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘You must not marry a daughter of a brother or daughter of a sister as a second wife, the first being her paternal or maternal aunt without their permission and you must not marry a paternal or maternal aunt as a second wife, the first being a daughter of her brother or a daughter of her sister, without their permission.’”

gradings.raw: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (20/182)
gradings.label: موثق
gradings.text: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (20/182)

narratorChain.raw: مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ يَحْيَى عَنْ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ عِيسَى عَنِ الْحَسَنِ بْنِ عَلِيِّ بْنِ فَضَّالٍ عَنِ ابْنِ بُكَيْرٍ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ مُسْلِمٍ عَنْ أَبِي جَعْفَرٍ ( عليه السلام ) قَالَ

titles.ar: باب الْمَرْأَةِ تُزَوَّجُ عَلَى عَمَّتِهَا أَوْ خَالَتِهَا
titles.en: Chapter 79 – The woman marries (as an additional wife) upon her paternal aunt or her maternal aunt

segments: سَمِعْتُ أَبَا جَعْفَرٍ ( عليه السلام ) قَالَ لَا تُنْكَحُ الْمَرْأَةُ عَلَى عَمَّتِهَا وَ لَا خَالَتِهَا إِلَّا بِإِذْنِ الْعَمَّةِ وَ الْخَالَةِ .
arabic.text: سَمِعْتُ أَبَا جَعْفَرٍ ( عليه السلام ) قَالَ لَا تُنْكَحُ الْمَرْأَةُ عَلَى عَمَّتِهَا وَ لَا خَالَتِهَا إِلَّا بِإِذْنِ الْعَمَّةِ وَ الْخَالَةِ .

segments: A number of our companions, from Sahl Bin Ziyad, from Al Hassan Bin Mahboub, from Ali Bin Raib, from Abu Ubeyda Al Haza’a who said,

‘I heard Abu Ja’far<sup>asws</sup>, he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Do not marry the woman (as an additional wife) upon her paternal aunt, nor upon the maternal aunt, except with the permission of the paternal aunt, and the maternal aunt’.
en.hubeali.text:
A number of our companions, from Sahl Bin Ziyad, from Al Hassan Bin Mahboub, from Ali Bin Raib, from Abu Ubeyda Al Haza’a who said,

‘I heard Abu Ja’far<sup>asws</sup>, he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Do not marry the woman (as an additional wife) upon her paternal aunt, nor upon the maternal aunt, except with the permission of the paternal aunt, and the maternal aunt’.

segments: 2. A number of our people have narrated from Sahl ibn Ziyad from al-Hassan ibn Mahbub from ibn Ri’ab from abu ‘Ubaydah al- Hadhdha’ who has said the following: “I once heard abu Ja‘far, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, saying, ‘You must not marry a woman as a second wife, the first being her paternal or maternal aunt, without her permission.’”
en.sarwar.text: 2. A number of our people have narrated from Sahl ibn Ziyad from al-Hassan ibn Mahbub from ibn Ri’ab from abu ‘Ubaydah al- Hadhdha’ who has said the following: “I once heard abu Ja‘far, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, saying, ‘You must not marry a woman as a second wife, the first being her paternal or maternal aunt, without her permission.’”

gradings.raw: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (0/182)
gradings.label: ضعيف على المشهور
gradings.text: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (0/182)

narratorChain.raw: عِدَّةٌ مِنْ أَصْحَابِنَا عَنْ سَهْلِ بْنِ زِيَادٍ عَنِ الْحَسَنِ بْنِ مَحْبُوبٍ عَنْ عَلِيِّ بْنِ رِئَابٍ عَنْ أَبِي عُبَيْدَةَ الْحَذَّاءِ قَالَ
